arts.ttl: UCL Liveblog: RB Leipzig-Juventus, Liverpool-Bologna, Shakhtar-Atalanta
Liverpool summer signing makes mark as 17-year-old nets winner in Europe
arts.sum: Amara Nallo was the matchwinner in Liverpool's UEFA Youth League clash against Bologna at Kirkby on Wednesday afternoon

arts.ttl: Arne Slot gets first chance to scout Liverpool transfer option after glowing recommendation
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Bologna in the Champions League on Wednesday night, and the Reds boss could get a glimpse of a young talent he may well want to bring to Anfield

arts.ttl: Who is Nikola Dabanovic, the referee for Liverpool - Bologna in the Champions League today?
arts.sum: Montenegrin referee Nikola Dabanovic will take charge of Liverpool and Bologna’s Champions League clash at Anfield today, on matchday two of the competition’s new league phase . Today’s game on Merseyside will be the first time Dabanovic has crossed paths with either Liverpool or Bologna .

arts.ttl: Liverpool could exploit Man United hesitance to land Jarrad Branthwaite transfer coup
arts.sum: Liverpool may not have made their interest in Jarrad Branthwaite formal but they have been handed a golden chance to pull off the transfer coup of the season

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s 10 worst transfers of all time
arts.sum: The Reds got very little wrong in the transfer market during Jurgen Klopp's reign as he re-established the Anfield club as one of the finest teams in European football, winning the Champions League in 2019 and Premier League in 2020. The Reds had a cracking team at that time in 2013 and came close to winning the league, with Aspas usually playing second fiddle to Luis Suarez and Daniel Sturridge for the forward spots.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot told 'dark cloud' will hang over Liverpool until urgent situation is resolved
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold's contacts expire in July and Champions League pundit Ally McCoist has spelt out what this means for Liverpoool

arts.ttl: 'If you're timid' - Bologna boss highlights Liverpool tactical strength under Arne Slot
arts.sum: Bologna defied the odds to qualify for the Champions League but don't want to just make up the numbers

arts.ttl: Chelsea rival Liverpool for versatile star, Arsenal considered him before choosing different signing
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly keeping tabs on Bayer Leverkusen’s versatile defender Piero Hincapie, having scouted him alongside his teammate Victor Boniface in the Bundesliga club’s Champions League clash with AC Milan this week. Hincapie has impressed in his time at Leverkusen, and it was recently reported that he came up on Arsenal’s radar in the summer, […] The post Chelsea rival Liverpool for versatile star, Arsenal considered him before choosing different signing appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna LIVE - UEFA Youth League score, goals and commentary stream
arts.sum: Live score updates and commentary stream from The Academy as Liverpool host Bologna in the UEFA Youth League
